soup_items.name: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa
soup_items.purpose: JPA/Hibernate persistence layer for managing patient health records and medical data entities
soup_items.risk_rationale: Core database persistence layer handling all patient data; failures could result in data loss, corruption, or unavailability of critical health information
soup_items.safety_analysis: Database persistence directly affects integrity of patient health records; data corruption or loss could lead to incorrect clinical decisions and patient harm

testing_required: Integration tests for all repository operations

soup_items.alternatives_considered: Direct JDBC considered but rejected due to increased development complexity and error potential

soup_items.name: hibernate-core

license.notes: Runtime library only, not distributed as modified derivative work

soup_items.purpose: Object-relational mapping framework for converting Java objects to database records and vice versa
soup_items.risk_rationale: Underlies all database operations; bugs in ORM layer could cause silent data corruption or incorrect query results affecting patient data
soup_items.safety_analysis: ORM mapping errors could result in persisting incorrect patient data or retrieving wrong records, directly impacting clinical decision making

soup_items.name: querydsl-jpa
soup_items.purpose: Type-safe query construction for complex database queries, reducing SQL injection risk and improving query correctness
soup_items.risk_rationale: Used for complex queries on patient data; incorrect query construction could return wrong data sets but type safety reduces risk
soup_items.safety_analysis: Query errors could result in displaying wrong patient records or missing critical health information in clinical views
soup_items.alternatives_considered: JPQL/HQL considered but QueryDSL provides better compile-time safety

soup_items.name: blaze-persistence-core
soup_items.purpose: Advanced JPA query optimization and entity view framework for improved QueryDSL performance and complex query handling
soup_items.risk_rationale: Enhances query performance but adds complexity layer; failures could impact system performance rather than correctness

soup_items.name: spring-boot-starter-artemis
soup_items.purpose: Message queue integration for asynchronous event processing, appointment notifications, and system integration
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles booking events and appointment notifications; message loss or duplication could result in missed appointments affecting patient care
soup_items.safety_analysis: Message queue failures could result in lost appointment notifications, leading to patients missing critical medical appointments

soup_items.name: artemis-jms-server
soup_items.purpose: Embedded message broker server for development and testing environments
soup_items.risk_rationale: Provided scope - used only in development/test environments, not in production deployment

soup_items.name: apache-cxf
soup_items.purpose: SOAP web services framework for external system integration (likely legacy healthcare system APIs)
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles external integrations with healthcare systems; communication failures or data corruption could impact clinical workflows
soup_items.safety_analysis: Integration with external healthcare systems; failures could result in incomplete patient data transfer or prescription errors

soup_items.name: flyway-core
soup_items.purpose: Database migration and version control for schema evolution across deployments
soup_items.risk_rationale: Manages database schema changes; migration errors could corrupt the database or cause data loss
soup_items.safety_analysis: Schema migration failures could result in database corruption, data loss, or system unavailability affecting all patient data access

soup_items.name: jackson-databind
soup_items.purpose: JSON serialization/deserialization for REST API data exchange and internal data processing
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles all API data serialization; errors could result in data corruption, API failures, or security vulnerabilities
soup_items.safety_analysis: Serialization errors could result in incorrect patient data transmission or exposure of sensitive health information

soup_items.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
soup_items.purpose: Java 8 date/time API support for Jackson, enabling proper serialization of appointment times and medical record timestamps
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles appointment times and medical record timestamps; incorrect serialization could result in wrong appointment times
soup_items.safety_analysis: Timestamp errors could lead to scheduling patients at incorrect times, potentially delaying critical care

soup_items.name: jackson-dataformat-csv
soup_items.purpose: CSV file import/export functionality for bulk data operations and reporting
soup_items.risk_rationale: Used for bulk operations; parsing errors could result in incorrect data import but limited to administrative functions

soup_items.name: lombok
soup_items.purpose: Code generation for boilerplate Java code (getters, setters, constructors, builders)
soup_items.risk_rationale: Compile-time code generation; errors would be caught during compilation, not at runtime
soup_items.alternatives_considered: Manual getter/setter generation considered but rejected due to maintenance burden

soup_items.name: pdfbox
soup_items.purpose: PDF document generation for medical reports, prescriptions, and patient documentation
soup_items.risk_rationale: Generates medical documents and prescriptions; errors could result in incorrect or unreadable documents but not direct patient harm
soup_items.safety_analysis: Document generation errors could result in unreadable prescriptions or missing information in medical reports, potentially affecting treatment

soup_items.name: spring-boot-starter-freemarker
soup_items.purpose: Template engine for generating dynamic content in emails, reports, and notifications
soup_items.risk_rationale: Generates patient notifications and communications; template errors could result in incorrect or missing information
soup_items.safety_analysis: Template errors could result in patients receiving incorrect appointment information or missing critical health alerts

soup_items.name: mysql-connector-j

license.notes: FOSS exception allows usage with FOSS applications

soup_items.purpose: JDBC driver for MySQL database connectivity
soup_items.risk_rationale: Primary database driver; failures could result in complete data access loss or data corruption
soup_items.safety_analysis: Database driver failures could prevent access to all patient data, severely impacting clinical operations
soup_items.alternatives_considered: MariaDB connector also present as alternative

soup_items.name: mariadb-java-client
soup_items.purpose: Alternative JDBC driver for MariaDB database connectivity
soup_items.risk_rationale: Alternative database driver; same critical functionality as MySQL connector
soup_items.safety_analysis: If used as primary driver, has same safety implications as MySQL connector

known_vulnerabilities.description: Extremely outdated version (1.8.0 from 2017); multiple security vulnerabilities likely present

soup_items.name: shedlock-spring
soup_items.purpose: Distributed scheduled task locking to prevent duplicate execution in clustered environments
soup_items.risk_rationale: Prevents duplicate scheduled task execution; failures could result in duplicate processing or missed tasks

soup_items.name: easy-rules-core
soup_items.purpose: Business rules engine for implementing clinical decision logic and workflow rules
soup_items.risk_rationale: Implements clinical decision logic; incorrect rule execution could lead to wrong clinical pathways or missed alerts
soup_items.safety_analysis: Business rule errors could result in incorrect clinical workflows, missed safety alerts, or inappropriate treatment recommendations

testing_required: Rule execution tests for all scenarios
Performance testing with complex rule sets

soup_items.name: klarna-kco-rest
soup_items.purpose: Klarna checkout integration for payment processing
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles payment processing; failures could prevent patients from booking appointments but does not directly affect clinical care

soup_items.name: spring-cloud-sleuth
soup_items.purpose: Distributed tracing for request tracking across microservices and integration points
soup_items.risk_rationale: Monitoring and tracing tool; failures would impact debugging capability but not system functionality
soup_items.alternatives_considered: Project deprecated; should migrate to Micrometer Tracing

soup_items.name: spring-boot-starter-actuator
soup_items.purpose: Application monitoring and management endpoints for health checks and metrics
soup_items.risk_rationale: Monitoring tool; failures would impact visibility but not core functionality

soup_items.name: junit-jupiter
soup_items.purpose: Unit testing framework for software verification
soup_items.risk_rationale: Test-only dependency; not included in production code

soup_items.name: testcontainers
soup_items.purpose: Integration testing with containerized dependencies (databases, message queues)
soup_items.risk_rationale: Test-only dependency; not included in production code

soup_items.name: h2database
soup_items.purpose: In-memory database for unit and integration testing
soup_items.risk_rationale: Test-only dependency with test scope; not included in production code. Note: Version pinned to 1.x due to COALESCE function compatibility

known_vulnerabilities.description: Remote code execution vulnerability in H2 Console

soup_items.alternatives_considered: Version 1.4.200 used due to COALESCE compatibility; H2 Console should be disabled in all environments

soup_items.name: mockito
soup_items.purpose: Mocking framework for unit testing
soup_items.risk_rationale: Test-only dependency; not included in production code

soup_items.name: awaitility
soup_items.purpose: Asynchronous testing support for verifying eventual consistency in tests
soup_items.risk_rationale: Test-only dependency with test scope; not included in production code

soup_items.name: commons-codec
soup_items.purpose: Encoding/decoding utilities for Base64, Hex, and other formats used in API integration
soup_items.risk_rationale: Utility library for encoding/decoding; errors unlikely to cause direct harm

soup_items.name: commons-lang
soup_items.purpose: Utility library for string manipulation and common Java operations
soup_items.risk_rationale: Utility library; failures unlikely to cause direct harm. Note: Very old version (2.6 from 2011)

soup_items.name: gson
soup_items.purpose: Alternative JSON library for Klarna SDK integration
soup_items.risk_rationale: Used for payment integration; errors could affect payment processing but not clinical care

soup_items.name: spring-retry
soup_items.purpose: Retry mechanism for transient failures in external service calls
soup_items.risk_rationale: Handles transient failures in critical integrations; misconfiguration could cause delays or missed retries
soup_items.safety_analysis: Retry failures on critical integrations (e.g., prescription systems) could delay or prevent medication orders

soup_items.name: json-smart
soup_items.purpose: Lightweight JSON parsing library, likely transitive from test dependencies
soup_items.risk_rationale: Lightweight JSON library; likely used in testing or limited scenarios

soup_items.name: smallrye-open-api
soup_items.purpose: OpenAPI 3.x documentation generation for REST APIs
soup_items.risk_rationale: Documentation generation tool with provided scope; not used at runtime in production

soup_items.name: owasp-dependency-check
soup_items.purpose: Security vulnerability scanning for dependencies during build process
soup_items.risk_rationale: Build-time tool only; not included in runtime application

soup_items.name: jacoco-maven-plugin
soup_items.purpose: Code coverage analysis for test verification
soup_items.risk_rationale: Build-time tool only; not included in runtime application

soup_items.name: logback-classic
soup_items.purpose: Logging framework for application logging and audit trails
soup_items.risk_rationale: Manages audit logs and diagnostic information; failures could impact compliance and troubleshooting

soup_items.name: slf4j-api
soup_items.purpose: Logging facade providing abstraction over logging frameworks
soup_items.risk_rationale: Logging abstraction layer; failures would impact logging but not core functionality

soup_items.name: validation-api
soup_items.purpose: Bean validation API for input validation annotations
soup_items.risk_rationale: Input validation is critical for data integrity and security; validation failures could allow invalid data into system
soup_items.safety_analysis: Validation errors could allow invalid patient data or medical information to be stored, affecting data quality and clinical decisions

soup_items.name: hibernate-micrometer
soup_items.purpose: Hibernate metrics integration with Micrometer for database performance monitoring
soup_items.risk_rationale: Monitoring tool; failures would impact visibility but not functionality

soup_items.name: spring-boot-starter-cache
soup_items.purpose: Caching abstraction for performance optimization of frequently accessed data
soup_items.risk_rationale: Caching can cause stale data issues; cache invalidation failures could show outdated patient information
soup_items.safety_analysis: Stale cached data could result in displaying outdated patient information or medical records, potentially affecting clinical decisions

runtime_soup.name: Java Runtime Environment
runtime_soup.purpose: Java runtime environment for application execution

runtime_soup.name: MySQL
runtime_soup.purpose: Primary relational database for patient data persistence

runtime_soup.name: Apache Artemis
runtime_soup.purpose: Message broker for asynchronous event processing
runtime_soup.configuration: JMS broker for appointment and booking events

runtime_soup.name: Container Base Image
runtime_soup.configuration: Requires review of Dockerfile and deployment manifests

action_items.action: Upgrade mariadb-java-client from 1.8.0 to latest 3.x version
action_items.rationale: Version 1.8.0 is from 2017 and extremely outdated; likely contains critical security vulnerabilities. Current version is 3.x with significant security improvements.

action_items.action: Ensure H2 Console is disabled in all environments and consider upgrade path
action_items.rationale: H2 1.4.200 has CVE-2022-45868 (critical RCE). While only used in tests, console must be disabled. Evaluate upgrade to 2.x when COALESCE compatibility is resolved.
commons-lang 2.6 is from 2011 and is deprecated. Should migrate to actively maintained commons-lang3.

action_items.action: Migrate from Spring Cloud Sleuth to Micrometer Tracing
action_items.rationale: Spring Cloud Sleuth is deprecated. Should migrate to Micrometer Tracing for continued support and updates.

action_items.action: Review easy-rules-core maintenance status and consider alternatives
action_items.rationale: Last release was in 2020. Given its critical role in clinical decision logic, should evaluate active alternatives or plan for maintenance.

action_items.action: Complete SOUP qualification for all critical-classified dependencies
action_items.rationale: IEC 62304 requires documented qualification activities for all SOUP in safety-relevant paths. 12 critical SOUP items identified.

action_items.action: Document transitive dependencies and complete dependency tree analysis
action_items.rationale: Current analysis covers direct dependencies only. Need to catalog all transitive dependencies with Maven dependency:tree.

action_items.action: Establish regular SOUP monitoring and update process
action_items.rationale: Need documented procedure for monitoring security advisories, CVEs, and updates for all SOUP components.
